market_context: Whipsaw tape: Benzinga 06-11 'Stock Market Whipsawed on Trump Statements, SpaceX Euphoria, ECB Rate Hike, Hotter PPI but Prior Revised'; 06-10 CPI printed 4.2% with Nasdaq 100 falling on hot inflation plus oil up on Iran strikes, after a 06-08 ceasefire rally and a 06-09 3% Nasdaq tumble. Macro is headline-driven and unstable, so the default today is hold across the tech names; the one action is a small JNJ buy where a multi-week catalyst stream remains unfalsified. Portfolio is currently 100% cash (no holdings per data/2026-06-12/_manifest.json), so no holdings news sweep was required.

signals.thesis: Catalyst stream intact: 06-11 IMAAVY hit target in wAIHA (rapid, durable anemia improvement; no FDA-approved therapies) and US rollout of presbyopia-correcting IOLs expanded; follows 06-09 MHRA nipocalimab authorization and 06-08 $1B Firefly Bio deal. Close 238.31 holds above the 230 falsification line in a weak tape (beta 0.26). Falsified if close < 230 or talc litigation escalates beyond the 06-10 $32M LA mesothelioma verdict.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-11: Johnson & Johnson Hits Target With IMAAVY In Rare Blood Disorder
Benzinga 2026-06-11: Johnson & Johnson Expands US Roll-Out Of Latest Advancement In Presbyopia-Correcting Intraocular Lenses
Benzinga 2026-06-10: Johnson & Johnson Fined $32M From Los Angeles Jury Over 2024 Death... Asbestos-Contaminated Talc Product (risk factor)

signals.thesis: Conflicting picture: Benzinga 06-11 'Does Apple's 8% Tumble Prove It's Too Little Too Late For Siri AI Ambitions?' questions the AI narrative, yet the 06-11 close of 295.48 is a 30-day high (vs 271.15 on 04-30). No new product or earnings catalyst in today's snapshot; in a whipsaw macro tape this is a hold. Re-evaluate on concrete Siri/AI product news or a break below 280.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-11: Does Apple's 8% Tumble Prove It's Too Little Too Late For Siri AI Ambitions?

signals.thesis: Soft drift, no actionable catalyst: close 390.26 vs 407.77 on 04-30, near the 52w low end (356.28-555.45). Headlines are cost-side: Benzinga 06-11 'Microsoft's Xbox Unit Braces For Major Layoffs' and a 06-12 report of conflict minerals allegedly reaching NVIDIA/Microsoft supply chains. Neither is a clean buy or sell trigger; hold and re-evaluate if supply-chain allegations draw regulatory action.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-11: Microsoft's Xbox Unit Braces For Major Layoffs
Benzinga 2026-06-12: Conflict Minerals Are Allegedly Reaching NVIDIA, Microsoft Supply Chains: Report

signals.thesis: Mixed signals cancel out: positive — Benzinga 06-12 'Chinese Customers Can Now Order NVIDIA's Vera CPUs' (Reuters-sourced) and Sharon AI's six-year 72MW Australia compute deal; negative — 06-12 conflict-minerals supply chain report and ongoing China chip-curb politics (new DC lobbyist hire). Beta 2.2 in a tape swinging 3% per day on macro headlines argues against initiating. Hold; revisit if Vera China sales get official confirmation.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-12: 'Nvidia Begins Vera CPU Sales Pitch To Chinese Clients, Sources Say' - Reuters Exclusive
Benzinga 2026-06-12: Sharon AI Signs Six-Year AI Infrastructure Compute Collaboration With Nvidia To Deploy 72MW Of New Data Center Capacity In Australia

signals.thesis: Regulatory overhang vs AI demand: Benzinga 06-12 'Meta, Google, Snap In Spotlight As UK Reportedly Eyes Crackdown On Harmful Social Media For Under-16s' adds regulatory risk, while 06-11 'Anthropic Turns To Google To Back Massive Data Center Push' supports the cloud/AI demand story. Price 357.87 is well off the 30-day high (~385) and the 52w high 408.61. No falsifiable edge either way today; hold.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-12: Meta, Google, Snap In Spotlight As UK Reportedly Eyes Crackdown On 'Harmful' Social Media For Under-16s (UPDATED)
Benzinga 2026-06-11: Anthropic Turns To Google To Back Massive Data Center Push

signals.thesis: Strong run, fresh regulatory cloud: close 405.27 is near the 52w high 415.98 after a 30-day climb from 370.58, but Benzinga 06-11 'Patients Denied Care, Then Approved Later? Federal Watchdog Raises Medicare Advantage Concerns' puts the core MA business under scrutiny. Chasing the move into a watchdog headline has poor risk/reward; hold. Falsifier for a future buy: the MA concern fading with price holding above 400.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-11: Patients Denied Care, Then Approved Later? Federal Watchdog Raises Medicare Advantage Concerns
